rationale: No conflict. Section 48.262 governs commissioner authority over federal impact aid adjustments for military-impacted districts; it does not reference or depend on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: The commissioner is granted the authority to ensure that school districts receiving federal impact aid due to the presence of a military installation or significant concentrations of military students do not receive more than an eight percent reduction should the federal government reduce appropriations to those schools.
_note: No textual link between the homestead exemption amount and this federal impact aid adjustment provision.
